home.intro: Vítejte v evropském žebříčku Mahjong, který zahrnuje disciplíny MCR a RCR. Body se počítají z výsledků turnajů uznaných European Mahjong Association (EMA). Tato stránka představuje týdenní žebříčky, historii turnajů, rekordy hráčů a zemí a Síň slávy.

ranking.podiums_title: Umístění na stupních vítězů v aktivních turnajích

tournament.map_hint: Klikněte na značku pro filtrování podle města

country.teams_help: Týmové skóre = průměr top 3 hráčů (0 při méně než 3 hráčích)

formulas.tournament_score_intro: In each tournament, every player receives a score between 0 and 1000 based on their finishing position:
formulas.var_n: total number of players in the tournament
formulas.coefficient_intro: Each tournament has a coefficient (also called 'MERS weight') reflecting its importance, computed as follows:
formulas.player_score_intro: A player's EMA score is the average of two parts, each weighted at 50%:
formulas.part_a_title: Part A - Average of N best results
formulas.part_a_desc: The player's N best results are retained (sorted by descending EMA score). In case of a tie, the most recent result is preferred. N depends on the total number of tournaments played in the active period:
formulas.part_a_tiebreak: If the player has fewer than 5 active tournaments, virtual results at 0 (weight 1) fill the average up to 5.
formulas.part_b_title: Part B - Average of 4 best results
formulas.part_b_desc: The player's 4 best results are retained (sorted by descending EMA score). In case of a tie, the result with the highest coefficient is preferred.
formulas.part_b_tiebreak: If the player has fewer than 4 active tournaments, virtual results at 0 (weight 1) fill the average up to 4.
formulas.weighted_avg_desc: Each result is weighted by the tournament coefficient and its age (time factor). Both parts A and B use this weighted average:
formulas.weighted_avg_note: The time factor is 1.0 for recent tournaments (≤ 52 active weeks) and 0.5 for older ones (53–104 active weeks). Beyond that, the tournament is inactive.
formulas.min_req_desc: A player must have participated in at least 2 active tournaments to appear in the ranking.
formulas.active_period_desc: A tournament contributes to the ranking for 2 years (104 active weeks). Its weight decreases over time:
formulas.covid_desc: The pandemic caused a complete stop of tournaments. To avoid penalising players, this 2-year period was excluded from the active week count: pre-COVID tournaments retained their normal contribution as if time had frozen.
formulas.world_desc: World championships (WMC for MCR, WRC for RCR) are not included in the EMA score calculation. They appear in the Hall of Fame but do not affect the weekly ranking.
formulas.formula_avg: average = Σ(EMA × coeff × time) / (Σ(coeff × time) + missing)
formulas.weekly_desc: The EMA ranking is recalculated once a week, every Monday.
formulas.weekly_activation_desc: A tournament takes effect on the Monday of the week following its start date - regardless of its duration. This rule ensures that each tournament is active for exactly 104 active weeks (excluding the COVID freeze), i.e. 2 years.
formulas.weekly_activation_note: All tournaments in the same calendar week share the same first active week.
formulas.note_inferred_tiebreak: Tiebreak rules (preference for the most recent result in part A, highest coefficient in part B) were inferred by data analysis. They are not officially documented by EMA.
formulas.note_inferred_covid: The exact COVID freeze dates (24/02/2020 → 28/03/2022) were determined by reverse engineering from historical ranking data.
formulas.note_divergence_weekly: The official EMA ranking does not specify an update frequency. This application recalculates the ranking every Monday.
formulas.note_divergence_104: The tournament contribution duration (104 active weeks) may differ from the official EMA definition, which expresses the period in calendar years rather than active weeks excluding the freeze.

ranking_system.cert_intro: EMA certifikuje turnaje v rámci systému hodnocení MERS.
ranking_system.cert_apply_desc: Členská organizace EMA může požádat o certifikaci turnaje. Žádost musí být zaslána národním členem představenstva představenstvu EMA nejméně 3 měsíce před turnajem.
ranking_system.cert_limit_desc: Každá země může pořádat až 3 MERS turnaje ročně a na pravidla, bez ohledu na váhu turnaje.
ranking_system.cert_req_open: Musí být otevřen všem hráčům z evropských zemí.
ranking_system.cert_req_players: Musí se zúčastnit alespoň 16 hráčů z členských zemí EMA.
ranking_system.cert_req_ema_num: Hráči potřebují registrační číslo EMA, aby byli uvedeni v žebříčku.
ranking_system.cert_observer_desc: Organizátoři jsou odpovědní za jmenování pozorovatele EMA a oznámení jeho jména nejméně dva týdny před akcí.
ranking_system.quotas_intro: Kvóty EMA určují počet míst přidělených každé zemi pro evropská a světová mistrovství.
ranking_system.quotas_a1: A1 - Jedno místo pro 3 nejlepší země EMA v národním žebříčku.
ranking_system.quotas_a2: A2 - Jedno místo pro každou zemi EMA.
ranking_system.quotas_a3: A3 - Jedno místo pro každou zemi s hráči nad 700 bodů.
ranking_system.quotas_b1: B1 - Procento hráčů v žebříčku (země / celkem).
ranking_system.quotas_b2: B2 - Procento hráčů s hodnocením nad 700 bodů (země / celkem).
ranking_system.quotas_b3: B3 - Průměr B1 a B2, aplikovaný na zbývající místa po části A.
ranking_system.quotas_limit_max: Země nemůže získat více míst, než je počet hráčů v žebříčku nad globálním průměrem.
ranking_system.quotas_limit_min: Každá země EMA má garantováno alespoň 1 místo.
ranking_system.quotas_invited_desc: Místa pro hráče mimo EMA a pozvané jsou stanovena EMA. Pokud hráči nemají zájem, místa jsou přerozdělena v rámci kvóty EMA.

about.presidium_desc: Každodenní záležitosti EMA zajišťuje pětičlenné prezidium.
about.board_desc: Každá členská země EMA jmenuje zástupce představenstva jako kontaktní místo mezi EMA a národní organizací.
about.documents_desc: Oficiální dokumenty EMA, pravidla a rozhodnutí, dostupné na webu EMA.

rules.no_translations: Zatím nejsou k dispozici žádné překlady.

referees.no_rcr: Zatím nejsou uvedeni žádní certifikovaní rozhodčí RCR.

quotas.subtitle: Seat distribution by country for EMA championships

compare.subtitle: Select up to 5 players to compare their ranking evolution and head-to-head record.
compare.no_common: No tournaments in common for this ruleset.
compare.empty_hint: Search and select players above to start comparing.

help.title: How it works
help.subtitle: A guide to every page and feature of EMA Ranking.

about.desc: Learn about the European Mahjong Association: its history, structure, and official documents.

rules.desc: Overview of the two rule sets used in EMA competitions.

ranking.desc: The live EMA ranking for MCR and RCR, updated weekly.
ranking.li1: Browse the ranking history week by week
ranking.li2: Switch between MCR and RCR with the tab buttons
ranking.li3: Search for a player by name
ranking.li4: Click a player row to see their full profile

compare.desc: Compare up to 5 players side by side on a single chart.
compare.li1: Search and add players using the autocomplete bar
compare.li2: Toggle between score and ranking on the Y axis
compare.li3: Zoom into 1 year, 3 years, or the full history
compare.li4: See head-to-head results in common tournaments and frequent shared opponents

ranking_system.desc: Detailed explanation of how EMA ranking points are calculated.
ranking_system.li1: Point formulas for each tournament type and coefficient

calendar.desc: Upcoming and past EMA-approved tournaments displayed on a calendar.
calendar.li2: Click a tournament name to visit the organiser's website
calendar.li3: Filter by rule set (MCR / RCR) using the buttons at the top

tournaments.desc: Full list of all EMA-registered tournaments with results.
tournaments.li1: Sort by date, country, or number of players
tournaments.li2: Click a tournament to see the full results table
tournaments.li3: Sort by date, country, or number of players

players.li1: Search by name or filter by country
players.li2: Sort by number of tournaments or name
players.li3: Click a player to open their detail page

player_detail.title: Player profile
player_detail.desc: Complete profile for a single player.
player_detail.li1: Score and ranking evolution chart (MCR / RCR)
player_detail.li2: Tournament history with position and points earned
player_detail.li4: Quick link to compare with another player

countries.li1: Number of players and tournaments per country
countries.li2: Click a country to see its players and results
countries.li3: Country ranking based on the top 3 players per country

quotas.desc: World Mahjong Championship and Open European qualification quotas.
quotas.li1: MCR and RCR quotas per country, based on the current ranking
quotas.li2: Updated automatically after each ranking week

hof.desc: Records and historical achievements across all EMA competitions.
hof.li1: Longest time at #1, highest score ever, most tournaments played
hof.li2: Best results at WMC and OEMC

navbar.title: Navigation bar
navbar.desc: Three utility buttons are always visible in the top-right corner of the navbar:
navbar.btn_rules: sets your default rule set (MCR or RCR). Pages with a MCR/RCR tab will automatically show your preference first.
navbar.btn_theme: toggles between light and dark mode.
navbar.btn_lang: opens the language selector to change the interface language.

country_detail.title: Country page
country_detail.desc: Detailed view for a single country.
country_detail.li1: Ranked list of the country's players for MCR and RCR
country_detail.li2: Tournament history hosted by that country
country_detail.li3: Map of cities where tournaments have been held
country_detail.circuit_note: National federations can also have their own circuit page — for example, see the
